programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a man claims possession of a cherished family lake house in New York, Flash and his team race to reclaim it. Convinced he knows the law, the combative squatter refuses to budge, escalating tensions at every turn. With Flash going undercover next door, can he gather the intel he needs to outsmart the squatter and take back the home?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Staten Island, rock legend Dee Snider of Twisted Sister and his wife, Suzette, are blindsided when her late father's caretaker refuses to leave the family home; what starts as a friendly exchange between Flash and two long-standing occupants, spirals into a full-scale battle with the squatter's family.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: A young couple in Philadelphia lists their home for sale, only to find a squatter already living in it; when confronted by Flash's team, he is completely shocked and produces a fraudulent lease; but can Flash see through the scam and help the homeowners take back what's rightfully theirs?

programme.title: Hider in My House
programme.desc: When stuff goes missing, Brittany Campbell blames her husband; she doesn't know a stranger living inside their home plans to use the couple in medical experiments; when Madisyn Gidrey's clothes disappear, friends tease that it's all in her mind.

programme.title: Hider in My House
programme.desc: When her family's gifts go missing, Stacy Ferrance blames the kids, but a dirty footprint leads her to a shocking surprise in the attic; college students Brett Mugglin and Mark Hartman hear eerie sounds and find their kitchen trashed.

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: The bidders arrive in the Dallas suburb of Lancaster; Ricky and Bubba hope to stock up on furniture; Moe makes a risky purchase after returning from his Hawaiian vacation; Jenny's mother joins in the action.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: Jenny squares off against Ricky and Bubba in Arlington; Moe and Mary discover sweet music; Victor goes undercover and winds up with a 1970s relic.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi and Jarrod argue over a horse head; a locker is littered with antique furniture; Dave makes another strange discovery.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The ladies from Vegas meet Dave, who promptly takes their locker away; Kenny uses Mary as a shield, and the two find their way to a decent unit of their own.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers hit Dan's hometown; the Vegas Ladies' locker really takes off; Kenny's purchase sets his wallet alight; Brandi and Jarrod put their vacation funds on the line.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave doesn't buy; Jarrod and Brandi uncover rare Depression-era art; Barry's art goes back to the Mayan culture; Darrell uncovers a possible Wells Fargo stagecoach gun.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The locker-lookers return to Montebello, Calif., where Darrell hopes to repeat past successes; Brandi learns that Jarrod is facing an important problem.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy records a hefty find in Adelanto, Calif.; Brandi and Jarrod hit it big when they test the waters; Mary cranks up her profit to the sweet sound of success.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A car thief flees arrest, sparking a two-day manhunt; a drone helps a rookie K9 make his first arrest, while in Florida, two suspects take to the water in a bid to escape justice and in Louisiana, a routine traffic stop reveals a dark tragedy.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: In Georgia, a crazed driver slams into a patrol car before escaping into swamp woods; deputies brave Florida's treacherous wetlands at night to track down an invisible fugitive; patrol officers chase a kayaker living on a derelict houseboat among the mangroves and in Louisiana, there's a snake alert!

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: In Florida, troopers risk life and limb wading through gator-infested swamps to track a suspect; a thief in Georgia is close to becoming gator feed to evade capture; a man acting erratically makes a surprising getaway and a gator comes between a woman and her pizza.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: Night falls in Louisiana as officers disturb a prolific burglar who escapes into gator-infested waters. Meanwhile, undercover detectives take to the Florida swamps to hunt down a wanted felon and police responding to a welfare call are taken by surprise. Later, a car chase in Arkansas ends up in flames and a deputy makes a big bird arrest.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: Deep in the swamps of the southern USA, a suspect swings through the trees in a desperate bid to avoid capture; a man crashes into marshland, sparking a grueling 14-hour manhunt; and in Texas, officers face an even bigger threat, as a 10-foot alligator requires some serious wrangling.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A K9 unit tracks a copper thief through punishing wetlands; a deputy gets a lucky escape after a gunman triggers a tense standoff; a suspect tries to make a watery getaway, and a dramatic car chase in Georgia leads to a surprising discovery.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol

programme.desc: Budding interior designer Cora and builder Jonny buy a house to renovate in Kirkham, Lancashire. But it has damp floorboards and leaking ceilings. Can they flip it for a profit.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Justin Moorhouse in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: On the Lancaster Canal, octogenarian boaters Tony and Margaret navigate low water levels. And Water Chaplains Kim and Paul have their boat blessed.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Sasha are busy creating a complicated confetti drop for an upcoming wedding. And Jo and Carmen try to complete their tricky swimming pool renovation.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Delightful décor, stunning views, sumptuous sausages and proper milk await the B&Bers at Simon and Vanessa's coastal guesthouse in Weymouth.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Belfast, Aodhan hopes to not only fill his guests but thrill them too, with his alter ego and horror-themed home.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals

programme.title: The Undeclared War
programme.desc: Cyber thriller with Simon Pegg and Siân Brooke. Vadim finds himself working in captivity for the Chinese. At GCHQ, Danny and Roz clash over China, and the mole hunt continues..

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: **Visually Signed** The Adventures of Paddington

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig and Grandad Dog are on their boats when Grandpa Pig drops an anchor on his foot! After an x-ray and plaster cast at the hospital, Grandpa Pig needs to stay overnight.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig found his night at the hospital so comfortable, he's reluctant to leave! Peppa and Suzy volunteers to nurse him at home and make sure he's as comfortable as in hospital.

programme.title: Tweedy & Fluff
programme.desc: Tweedy uses an old nailbrush to clean up Fluff's muddy paw prints. But the frog-themed brush looks quite intimidating from Fluff's point of view.

programme.title: Odo
